candidates.why: Generic depreciation rows are present, but none are explicitly tied to cost of materials, subcontractors, cost of sales, or cost of revenue. Using them for COGS would risk allocating broad operating D&A to COGS and double counting.
This is a broad D&A/write-down heading or summary, not a COGS-specific operating row. It is not clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket.
Potential D&A-related row, but not shown with values and not linked specifically to COGS. Too ambiguous to add to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row in the excerpt is clearly attributable to the selected COGS row 'Cost of materials and subcontractors'. Conservative no-add to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A row clearly tied to an overhead/R&D bucket. It appears as a separate same-level line above EBIT, and there is no separate XRD row selected, so this R&D-related D&A would not otherwise be captured symmetrically through XRD subtraction.
Generic depreciation rows likely cover broader operating depreciation and are not clearly SG&A-specific. Selecting them would risk overlap with other operating buckets.
Broad summary/heading that is not specifically attributable to SG&A versus other operating areas.
Potentially relevant to SG&A, but no values are shown and it is not clearly tied to the selected XSGA bucket.

variables.notes: Manually Changed. Selected only the explicit R&D-related depreciation row. Excluded generic depreciation/amortisation rows because they are not clearly SG&A-specific and could span multiple operating buckets.
